message:
test(wave-23): add 16 unit tests for conformance/mod, sync/barrier

conformance/mod.rs: 9 tests covering TestConfig builders, TaskHandle/RegionHandle
IDs, LabRuntimeTarget with_tracing/without_seed.
sync/barrier.rs: 7 tests covering BarrierWaitError traits (Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq/
Display/Error), Barrier debug/parties, BarrierWaitResult is_leader.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
